sheet.label: THETA CHATBOT · ROADMAP
sheet.title: Chapter 16 – Future Roadmap
sheet.p: The Theta Chat Bot has been designed using a modular and extensible architecture that supports future enhancements with minimal changes to the existing system. While the initial implementation focuses on delivering accurate website-based responses using a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture, the proposed design enables the chatbot to evolve incrementally as business requirements grow.
The roadmap below outlines the planned evolution of the chatbot while maintaining scalability, maintainability, and deployment flexibility.
The first phase focuses on delivering a production-ready chatbot integrated with the Theta Technolabs website.

row.cell: Component
Feature Deliverable
Website-based knowledge retrieval utilizing RAG architecture.
Google Gemini API integration (with OpenAI as a tested alternative).
Sentence Transformers for generating local vector embeddings.
FastAPI application with Docker-based deployment.
PostgreSQL integration with pgvector for vector search.
Webflow chatbot integration with session-based conversation memory.
Source-aware responses and confidence-based fallback handling.

sheet.p: Objective: Deliver a production-ready chatbot capable of providing accurate, context-aware responses using the official Theta Technolabs knowledge base while establishing the foundation for future monitoring and analytics.
Following the initial deployment, the focus shifts toward improving operational visibility, monitoring, and performance analysis.

row.cell: Focus Area
Feature Deliverable
Centralized interface for overall system visibility and management.
Comprehensive request, response, and conversation history logging.
Performance monitoring and continuous usage analytics tracking.
Knowledge synchronization history and automated audit trails.
AI-powered conversation summaries and direct user feedback collection.

sheet.p: Objective: Improve operational monitoring and provide actionable insights into chatbot usage, conversation trends, and overall system performance.
This phase focuses on enhancing the overall user experience and making interactions more engaging and accessible.

row.cell: Enhancement
Feature Deliverable
Voice-based interaction and file upload support.
Rich response cards and dynamically suggested follow-up questions.
Multi-language support for diverse and global user bases.
Enhanced conversation memory mapping for long-running contexts.
Continued and targeted accessibility improvements for all users.

sheet.p: Objective: Improve usability, accessibility, and the overall conversational experience for website visitors.

The long-term vision is to continuously enhance the Theta Chat Bot by improving response quality, user experience, and operational efficiency while preserving its modular architecture. Future enhancements will focus on increasing system performance, simplifying maintenance, and supporting evolving business requirements without requiring significant architectural changes.

row.cell: Strategic Area
Roadmap Deliverable
Multi-website support and continuous backend performance optimization.
Improved RAG techniques and enhanced semantic search accuracy.
Advanced conversation analytics and fully automated reporting.
Improved algorithmic response quality evaluation processes.
Fully automated knowledge synchronization pipelines.

sheet.p: The modular architecture proposed in this project provides the flexibility to incorporate these enhancements incrementally while maintaining system stability and maintainability.

row.cell: Phase
Primary Objective
Deploy a production-ready RAG chatbot and establish the core AI platform
Introduce monitoring, dashboards, and operational analytics
Enhance user experience and accessibility
Expand the chatbot through continuous improvements and support for future business requirements

sheet.p: The phased roadmap enables incremental development while minimizing implementation risk. Each phase builds upon the existing modular architecture, allowing the Theta Chat Bot to evolve into a scalable, maintainable, and intelligent customer support solution without requiring a complete system redesign.
